title: Crispy Chinese Broccoli Puff
description: A quick and easy vegetarian dish featuring crispy, nutty Chinese broccoli florets served as a snack or side dish.
instructions: Wash the Chinese broccoli thoroughly and cut it into small florets.
Heat oil in a deep pan or wok over medium-high heat. Add garlic and sauté for about 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add the Chinese broccoli to the pan, tossing well to coat with oil and garlic.
Cook for about 5-7 minutes or until the florets are just tender but still slightly crisp. Season with a pinch of salt during cooking.
Serve hot as is or toss briefly with a bit more seasoning if desired.
